# Legacy SQL (deprecated)

**Do not edit or run these files for new environments.**

| Source of truth | Action |
|-----------------|--------|
| `supabase/migrations/<timestamp>_*.sql` | Edit schema here |
| `supabase/APPLY_ALL_P0020_COOKIE_BRIDGE.sql` | Generated — `pnpm generate:apply-all` |
| Supabase CLI | `supabase db push` |

Files in this folder are kept for history only. They were merged into timestamped migrations or into the generated `APPLY_ALL`.

See [docs/SUPABASE-P0020.md](../docs/SUPABASE-P0020.md).
